name: Joakim Lundell: Varje sida räknas
overview: In the series Joakim Lundell: Varje sida räknas, he methodically goes through the documents in ten episodes, where each page is dramatized with sound and image. Viewers get a unique opportunity to take part in the authorities' version of his childhood and form their own opinion.

trailers.title: Joakim Lundells "Varje sida räknas" - Premiär 20 februari på VOYD Play
